checks.description: When the output enable signal mul_en_out is asserted, the product output mul_out must equal the unsigned multiplication of the input operands mul_a and mul_b; when mul_en_out is deasserted, mul_out must be zero.
notes: Conservative check does not assume a fixed latency; it only requires eventual consistency after the operation is applied.
checks.pass_condition: Eventually (within an event‑based observation window) after mul_en_in is asserted, if mul_en_out becomes high then mul_out equals mul_a * mul_b; otherwise mul_out remains zero.
checks.trigger_condition: When mul_en_in transitions high for a legal multiplication operation.
